questions.question: What nation do Britons call "the republic"?
Who caused a commotion at a PBS kids' show rehearsal when sparks began flying off his smoking head, in 1997?
What New England state was the first to declare slavery illegal, in 1783?
What type of celestial body, dubbed XF11, was erroneously reported in 1998 as a threat to Earth?
What Native American language was Super Bowl XXX the first to broadcast in?
What entree did Arizona prison officials threaten to serve for 21 straight days to inmates who misbehaved, in 1984?
